name: donation-place-search
description: Use when the user asks where to donate, 기부처 조회, or donation place recommendations by Korean location and category. Recommend recipients with best-effort 1365 verification-assist links and never execute donations. 돌쇠에서는 공식 표면을 통한 후속 액션까지 진행한다.
